name: stories
description: A soul-bearing wiki for your codebase — read the stories before non-trivial changes, rewrite them after. Doubles as a knowledge wiki for deep research.

plugins.name: stories
plugins.description: A soul-bearing wiki for your codebase. Capture the why, not the what: a read-before-change gate, auto-authoring, and deep-research auto-filing. Dormant until docs/stories/ exists.
